name: Feature / Shader idea
about: New simulation feature, rendering effect, or interaction

---

**What do you want to add?**
Describe the visual effect or simulation feature.

**Technical Approach**
If you have an idea of which shader(s) to modify or what new pass to add, describe it.

**References**
Papers, demos, or examples of the effect you're going for.
